name: Houthis
q1_economic: Yemen — one of world's poorest. GDP per capita ~$600. Economically irrelevant — which is why economic pressure fails.
q2_psychological: Revenge for 10 years of Yemen war 2015-2025. Saudi bombing, blockade, cholera, starvation.
q7_vendetta: Historical grievance 9.5/10. Generational. Pre-existing before Iran war. Will outlast any Iran-US deal.
q8_collapse_trigger: Yemen peace settlement addressing root grievances. Currently no party is working on this.

verified_actions.action: IMO documents first Houthi attacks on Red Sea commercial shipping
Forces Maersk full Red Sea suspension
Resumes Red Sea attacks simultaneously with Hormuz closure
